---
title: "2026 content & conferences updates" 
date: "11 May 2026" 
categories:   
  - 2026 
output:   
  html_document:      
    toc: true     
    toc_float: false     
    toc_level: 5     
    df_print: paged 
---

# Attendees

```{r}
#| label: attendees 
#| echo: false 
#| message: false 
#| warning: false  
attend_list <- readr::read_csv("../2026_team_members.csv") 
knitr::kable(   
  list(attend_list[c(1, 5)]), 
  "html" 
)
```

# Agenda & Minutes

**New content**

-   Weighted Log rank test PR accepted and will be in soon

-   Accelerated Failure Time in SAS, and R vs SAS: Miriam is finishing the comparison by Monday the 18th

-   Restricted mean survival (RMST) comparison R vs SAS expected from GSK soon

**Blogs**

-   Miriams GEE/GLMM blog was submitted to PHUSE already and will be submitted to PSI this week

-   Sarah's Tipping point blog is ready too.

**Conference schedule**

-   Brian attending PharmaSUG end May and will advertise CAMIS
-   ASA biopharm regulatory stats - atorusresearch workshop (Action for Lyn to follow up with them). https://www.amstat.org/meetings/asa-biopharmaceutical-section-regulatory-industry-statistics-workshop

**General updates**
Christina will be on maternity leave from end June.  Contact Yannick or Lyn whilst Christina is out.

**Next meeting: 8th June 4:30 GMT, 5:30 CET and 11:30 EST**
